text_block_list.name: Opera O & Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Together, we can make the play even more
exciting! Isn't that right, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...!
Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to get even stronger! I'll redeem myself
at the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Haha... So much for the data. So much for
everything I "knew"...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (I can't believe it. Their stats were improving during the race.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Their strength can't be measured in numbers.
Those two shattered the thresholds I
painstakingly calculated as if they were nothin'.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I got ahead of myself. I changed the
seven-centimeter gap... and started thinking I'd
changed fate itself.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But this race... This had to be destiny.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow, talk about a letdown...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The classic-year racers are so underwhelming. I
thought Shakur was at least okay-ish, but that run
just now says otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... The Triple Crown races this year felt like
there was zero competition. Pretty lame,
compared to how hard Opera O and Doto push
each other.

Shakur got a lucky break this year, but I can't
imagine her standing a chance against the runners
coming next year. Guess this is the end of her,
huh?

The representative of the "weakest generation"
may stand above the rest in her year, but she's
still weak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Air Shakur returns from the race, something
is clearly wrong.
choice_data_list:
Let's head back as soon as you're done
changing.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there was something else I wanted to say
about today's race...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Doto really tried her best, didn't she? It made me
want to cheer her on even more!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...
choice_data_list: The taxi should be here any moment.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm okay. You take it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: It'll be quieter back on campus.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur stays silent for the entire taxi ride.
choice_data_list: I'll check up on you tomorrow, okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Wait.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My next goal race hasn't changed. I still want to
run the spring Tenno Sho, just like we planned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is the longest G1, clocking
in at 3,200 meters. With her aptitude for long
distances, Air Shakur should be able to do well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The only problem is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Opera O and Doto are definitely gonna be
there... Narita Top Road too.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We'll need to come up with a strategy to beat
them. I'll start on a new dataset...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Then... we just gotta train till my numbers are
better than theirs...
choice_data_list: We can discuss all that tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: Let's make next year your era.
Let's make next year your era.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep watch over Air Shakur as she leaves. That's
not the only thing I can do for her, though. In
fact, I know exactly what to do.
choice_data_list:
(I just have to tell her everything I've seen till
now.)

(I just have to tell her everything I've seen till
now.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Haaah...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Calm down. I've collected the data. All that's left
is to calculate the thresholds I need to reach in
order to win.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I've got no choice but to meet those numbers, no
matter how ridiculous they are.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(What the... I'm going to lose? And not just
that...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
These are the same values I got before I changed
the seven-centimeter gap. This is my worst
possible fate...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So essentially... nothing's really changed.

The representative of the "weakest generation"
may stand above the rest in her year, but she's
still weak.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I see how it is.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So even you want to see my downfall, Parcae.
